mapper.update: update app.subscription_version_action set action_status = #{actionStatus}, handled_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select sva.id, sva.subscription_id, sva.product_id, sva.product_version_id, sva.action_type, sva.action_status, sva.change_type, sva.version_note, sva.created_at, sva.handled_at from app.subscription_version_action sva inner join app.advisor_product_subscription s on s.id = sva.subscription_id where s.user_id = #{userId} and sva.action_status = 'PENDING' order by sva.created_at desc, sva.id desc

select id, subscription_id, product_id, product_version_id, action_type, action_status, change_type, version_note, created_at, handled_at from app.subscription_version_action where subscription_id = #{subscriptionId} and action_status = 'PENDING' order by created_at desc, id desc limit 1
